---
title: "Sister Augustine, Superior of the Sisters of Charity at the St. Johannis Hospital at Bonn"
---

## Sister Augustine, Superior of the Sisters of Charity at the St. Johannis Hospital at Bonn

**Author:** Henri Lecoultre
**Date:** 1880
**Imprint:** London: Kegan Paul

### Notes

This was an authorized translation, by Emily Augusta, Lady Durand, of Henri Lecoultre’s German biography of Amalie von Lasaulx (1815-1872).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
